pi_items.source: Checked the task description for the required patient name and verified that 'Ana Isabel Betz' exists in the GNU Health Demo Database (gnuhealth-50-demo.sql.gz) party_party table.
Checked the task description which explicitly instructs to select Test Type 'GLYCATED HEMOGLOBIN (HbA1c)', matching the 'HBA1C' code created in the setup scripts.
Verified against the task description which explicitly instructs to enter the HbA1c value '7.2'.
Verified against the task description which explicitly instructs to enter the unit '%'.
Verified against the task description which explicitly instructs the agent to 'Validate the results', corresponding to the 'Validated' status.

privileged_info_summary: I verified that the GNU Health demo database used in this task is synthetically generated. I also verified all metadata claims against the task instructions and the underlying database state. The expected patient 'Ana Betz' matches the 'Ana Isabel Betz' record in the party_party table of the demo database. The expected test type 'HbA1c' accurately corresponds to the 'GLYCATED HEMOGLOBIN (HbA1c)' test type injected into the database by the setup script. The expected result value '7.2' and unit '%' match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt. Finally, the expected status 'Validated' correctly reflects the task's instruction to validate the recorded results.
